sql_array: CREATE TABLE polygons (id UInt32, coords Array(Array(Array(Float64))) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id);
SELECT id, polygonPerimeterCartesian(coords) AS perimeter FROM polygons;
UPDATE polygons SET coords = [[[(1., 1.), (1., 6.), (6., 6.), (6., 1.)]]] WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, polygonPerimeterCartesian(coords) AS new_perimeter FROM polygons WHERE id = 1;
